description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a deploy stage containing a pages job that runs only on the master branch. The pages job should execute the exact shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. It must publish the resulting public directory as an artifact (paths: public) and deploy it to GitLab Pages. No specific Docker image or services are defined, so the default runner image is used, and the job runs in the deploy stage.
